ground.schema:
Node properties:
User {betweenness: FLOAT, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, following: INTEGER, profile_image_url: STRING, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING, url: STRING, statuses: INTEGER}
Me {profile_image_url: STRING, betweenness: FLOAT, following: INTEGER, url: STRING, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING}
Tweet {created_at: DATE_TIME, id: INTEGER, id_str: STRING, text: STRING, favorites: INTEGER, import_method: STRING}
Hashtag {name: STRING}
Link {url: STRING}
Source {name: STRING}
Relationship properties:
SIMILAR_TO {score: FLOAT}
The relationships:
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Me)
(:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:User)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:Me)
(:Me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:Me)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:RT_MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Me)
(:Tweet)-[:USING]->(:Source)
(:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(:Hashtag)
(:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)
(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet)
(:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(:Tweet)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (user:User {name: 'TechExplorer'})-[r1:FOLLOWS]->(central:Me),
    p2 = (central)-[r2:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet {created_at: '2023-11-15T12:00:00Z'}),
    p3 = (tweet)-[r3:TAGS]->(hashtag:Hashtag {name: 'Tech'}),
    p4 = (tweet)-[r4:CONTAINS]->(link:Link {url: 'https://dev.com/updates'})-[r5:USING]->(source:Source {name: 'TechDev'})
WHERE size([(p1)-[r:FOLLOWS]->(p4) | r.type in ['FOLLOWS', 'INTERACTS_WITH']]) > 0
RETURN p1, p2, p3, p4, p5:source;
ground.question: How does the engagement network around TechExplorer’s tweet on November 15, 2023, about the "Tech" hashtag and the Dev.com update reflect the broader influence of TechDev’s content within tech-focused communities?

cypher: MATCH (me:Me {screen_name: 'TechDev'})-[:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet)-[:USING]->(source:Source),       (tweet)-[:TAGS]->(hashtag:Hashtag),       (tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(link:Link),       (tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(user:User)-[:POSTS]->(user_tweet:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(me),       (user)-[:POSTS]->(user_tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(tweet)\nWHERE tweet.created_at >= datetime('2023-11-15') AND tweet.created_at <= datetime('2023-11-15 23:59:59')\nRETURN (tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(user)-[:POSTS]->(user_tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(tweet) AS engagement_network
